title: Simple F3
description: Adds an extra, simplified, and configurable F3 menu.
body:
# Simple F3

A mod for **Fabric/Quilt** that adds an extra configurable F3 screen. The Simple F3 screen contains information that is commonly used by players like FPS, coordinates, current biome, etc.

The Simple F3 screen is accessed by pressing F3 twice in-game.
